description_long: This object consists of a diverse group of shrubs and small plants, each with distinct foliage and growth forms. The central shrub is the tallest, featuring a thick, upright trunk and a crown of large, arching, pinnate leaves reminiscent of a tree fern or cycad. Surrounding it are several smaller shrubs and ground-cover plants, displaying a variety of leaf shapes, including long, slender blades, broad simple leaves, and finely divided fronds. The foliage colors range from deep green to lighter, yellowish-green tones, with some plants exhibiting a more bushy, compact habit while others are more sparse and upright. The arrangement suggests a curated planting, typical of urban landscaping or park environments. No flowers are visible, and the overall appearance is lush and well-maintained.
description: A group of varied shrubs and small plants with lush green foliage, including a tall, fern-like centerpiece and several smaller, bushy and blade-leaved companions. The arrangement is dense and visually diverse, suitable for urban landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tallest shrub with a thick trunk and large, arching leaves at the center, flanked by smaller, upright and bushy plants.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the linear arrangement of the shrubs, highlighting the varying heights and leaf shapes, with the tallest plant's trunk and fronds clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the back of the central shrub, showing the dense foliage and the arrangement of smaller plants behind it.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the group from the other end, emphasizing the spread of the foliage and the diversity in plant forms.
